extensionDescription.message: Stjärnmärk evenemang i Almedalsveckans program och exportera ditt schema som kalenderfil.

starEvent.description: Accessible label for star button when event is not starred

unstarEvent.description: Accessible label for star button when event is starred

openFullList.description: Button to open stars page from popup

sortStarredDesc.description: Sort order: most recently starred first

emptyStateMessage.message: Besök Almedalsveckans program och klicka på stjärnan för att spara evenemang.

unstarAction.description: Unstar action label in stars page grid

icsSourceLabel.description: Source label prefix in ICS DESCRIPTION field

conflictWarning.description: Short label indicating an event overlaps with another

conflictTooltip.description: Tooltip text showing which events overlap with this one

undoAction.description: Button label for undoing a removal action

eventRemoved.description: Toast message shown when an event is unstarred

expandEvent.description: Accessible label for expand toggle button when event is collapsed

collapseEvent.description: Accessible label for collapse toggle button when event is expanded

eventCountIndicator.description: Count indicator showing displayed vs total events in popup header

loadMore.description: Button label to load more events in the popup list

filterPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the search filter input on the stars page

filterLabel.description: Accessible label for the search filter input on the stars page

selectAll.description: Label for select-all checkbox in bulk selection header

unstarSelected.description: Button label for batch unstar action on selected events

exportSelected.description: Button label for batch export action on selected events

onboardingTitle.description: Onboarding view heading shown on first run

onboardingStep2.message: Klicka på stjärnan för att spara event

onboardingStep3.message: Öppna tillägget för att se sparade event

onboardingDismiss.description: Button label to dismiss the onboarding view

helpLink.description: Persistent help link to re-open onboarding view

languageLabel.description: Accessible label for the language toggle select element

languageAuto.description: Language toggle option to follow browser language setting

goToProgramme.description: Link to open the Almedalsveckan programme page

reloadPopupHint.description: Hint shown next to language dropdown indicating popup needs to be reopened

languageVisibleLabel.description: Visible label shown before the language dropdown

sortVisibleLabel.description: Visible label shown before the sort dropdown

showMore.description: Tooltip for expand button on event items

showLess.description: Tooltip for collapse button on event items

conflictIndicator.description: Label shown in tooltip for the conflict dot indicator on overlapping events

helpModalTitle.description: Title heading displayed at the top of the help modal

helpModalDismiss.description: Label for the dismiss button in the help modal

helpGroupStarEventsHeading.description: Heading for the star events feature group in help modal

helpGroupStarEventsDesc.message: Klicka på stjärnan bredvid ett evenemang i Almedalsveckans program för att spara det. Stjärnan blir ifylld när eventet är sparat.
helpGroupStarEventsDesc.description: Description for the star events feature group in help modal

helpGroupPopupViewHeading.description: Heading for the popup view feature group in help modal

helpGroupPopupViewDesc.message: Klicka på tilläggets ikon för att se dina sparade evenemang i en kompakt lista. Härifrån kan du snabbt exportera eller öppna hela listan.
helpGroupPopupViewDesc.description: Description for the popup view feature group in help modal

helpGroupStarsPageHeading.description: Heading for the stars page feature group in help modal

helpGroupStarsPageDesc.message: En helsidesvy med alla dina stjärnmärkta evenemang i ett överskådligt rutnät. Öppna via länken i popupen.
helpGroupStarsPageDesc.description: Description for the stars page feature group in help modal

helpGroupSortingHeading.description: Heading for the sorting feature group in help modal

helpGroupSortingDesc.message: Sortera dina evenemang kronologiskt, omvänt kronologiskt, efter titel eller efter när de stjärnmärktes.
helpGroupSortingDesc.description: Description for the sorting feature group in help modal

helpGroupConflictHeading.description: Heading for the conflict detection feature group in help modal

helpGroupConflictDesc.message: Evenemang som överlappar i tid markeras automatiskt så att du kan undvika dubbelbokningar i ditt schema.
helpGroupConflictDesc.description: Description for the conflict detection feature group in help modal

helpGroupSearchFilterHeading.description: Heading for the search and filter feature group in help modal

helpGroupSearchFilterDesc.message: Filtrera listan på stjärnsidan genom att söka på titel, arrangör eller ämne.
helpGroupSearchFilterDesc.description: Description for the search and filter feature group in help modal

helpGroupBulkActionsHeading.description: Heading for the bulk actions feature group in help modal

helpGroupBulkActionsDesc.message: Markera flera evenemang på stjärnsidan för att ta bort eller exportera dem samtidigt.
helpGroupBulkActionsDesc.description: Description for the bulk actions feature group in help modal

helpGroupIcsExportHeading.description: Heading for the ICS export feature group in help modal

helpGroupIcsExportDesc.message: Exportera valda evenemang som en ICS-fil som du kan importera i Google Kalender, Outlook eller Apple Kalender.
helpGroupIcsExportDesc.description: Description for the ICS export feature group in help modal

helpGroupLanguageHeading.description: Heading for the language toggle feature group in help modal

helpGroupLanguageDesc.message: Växla mellan svenska och engelska via språkmenyn. Ändringen gäller för hela tilläggets gränssnitt.
helpGroupLanguageDesc.description: Description for the language toggle feature group in help modal
